verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: I swear by the Day of Resurrection
verse.verse_2: And I swear by the reproaching soul [to the certainty of resurrection].
verse.verse_3: Does man think that We will not assemble his bones?
verse.verse_4: Yes. [We are] Able [even] to proportion his fingertips.
verse.verse_5: But man desires to continue in sin.
verse.verse_6: He asks, "When is the Day of Resurrection?"
verse.verse_9: And the sun and the moon are joined,
verse.verse_10: Man will say on that Day, "Where is the [place of] escape?"
verse.verse_12: To your Lord, that Day, is the [place of] permanence.
verse.verse_13: Man will be informed that Day of what he sent ahead and kept back.
verse.verse_14: Rather, man, against himself, will be a witness,
verse.verse_15: Even if he presents his excuses.
verse.verse_16: Move not your tongue with it, [O Muhammad], to hasten with recitation of the Qur'an.
verse.verse_17: Indeed, upon Us is its collection [in your heart] and [to make possible] its recitation.
verse.verse_18: So when We have recited it [through Gabriel], then follow its recitation.
verse.verse_19: Then upon Us is its clarification [to you].
verse.verse_20: No! But you love the immediate
verse.verse_22: [Some] faces, that Day, will be radiant,
verse.verse_24: And [some] faces, that Day, will be contorted,
verse.verse_25: Expecting that there will be done to them [something] backbreaking.
verse.verse_26: No! When the soul has reached the collar bones
verse.verse_27: And it is said, "Who will cure [him]?"
verse.verse_28: And the dying one is certain that it is the [time of] separation
verse.verse_29: And the leg is wound about the leg,
verse.verse_30: To your Lord, that Day, will be the procession.
verse.verse_31: And the disbeliever had not believed, nor had he prayed.
verse.verse_32: But [instead], he denied and turned away.
verse.verse_33: And then he went to his people, swaggering [in pride].
verse.verse_35: Then woe to you, and woe!
verse.verse_36: Does man think that he will be left neglected?
verse.verse_37: Had he not been a sperm from semen emitted?
verse.verse_38: Then he was a clinging clot, and [Allah] created [his form] and proportioned [him]
verse.verse_39: And made of him two mates, the male and the female.
verse.verse_40: Is not that [Creator] Able to give life to the dead?
